creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
Bind 9.11 is still in ports tree. The 9.11 version is ESV version which means it will be supported for next 2 years (EOL is planned for 1st quarter of 2020). 
From the other hand, in the recent versions of Bind (9.13.7 and later) "a new plugin mechanism has been added to allow extension of query processing functionality through the use of external libraries. The new filter-aaaa.so plugin replaces the filter-aaaa feature that was formerly implemented as a native part of BIND"[1]. This plugin is a part of both dns/bind914 and dns/bind916 ports (packages). Please take a look at filter-aaaa(8).

[1] Bind 9.13.7 release notes.
